title: Struck or Dissolved Entities
text:
class="news-detail cms">

 The Cayman Islands Monetary Authority (the “Authority”) wishes to advise that the following entities failed to satisfy the Authority’s termination requirements and effective 15 March 2023 have been removed from the Authority’s register as they were struck off the Companies Register of the General Registry.
